title: Florida Statutes § 775.0849 — Public service announcements; ch. 99-188.
text: 775.0849 Public service announcements; ch. 99-188.—In order to inform the public and to deter and prevent crime in the state, the Executive Office of the Governor shall place public service announcements in visible local media throughout the state explaining the penalties provided in chapter 99-188, Laws of Florida.
